title: Boot lora_ping sample firmware
description: Boot lichen/samples/lora_ping through each valid tracked Renode/physical backend. Replace stale board selectors and continue-on-error evidence with a deterministic UART plus external radio-effect oracle.
acceptance_criteria: 1. At least one valid Renode board boots lora_ping and produces externally observed TX. 2. Every tracked lora_ping backend is classified WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED. 3. Stale nrf52840_lichen selectors are not counted as results. 4. Commands, revision, hashes, logs, and cleanup are recorded.
notes:
RESULTS at base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 on branch wip/checkpoint-20260715 plus scoped lora_ping/Renode changes. Runtime command pattern: PYTHONPATH=python/src uv run python /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-harness.py. T-Echo Renode WIN: default harness environment; ELF lichen-m5m1-lora-ping.elf SHA-256 4ddbea69b20a609b60400dbaf08b9e78dd442806cf42c5fcd51b1874d70e25fd. RAK4631 Renode WIN: LICHEN_PREFIX=lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-rak4631 LICHEN_ELF=/var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-rak4631.elf; SHA-256 234025c40f6de2461cecc6102d818c824c114fc03f1b6ce5167a02c19ee119e2. Nucleo WL55JC Renode WIN: LICHEN_PREFIX=lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-nucleo-wl55jc LICHEN_ELF=/var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-nucleo-wl55jc.elf LICHEN_PLATFORM=/Volumes/Attic/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/nucleo_wl55jc_renode.repl LICHEN_KIND=nucleo_wl55jc; SHA-256 d05bd24ea3bf7f92140d50b9a78f1d86cf21e00422892d1f3115ae1214bf82c6. Oracle for every WIN: harness independently requires Booting Zephyr OS, LoRa configured, TX done, Connected to lichen-sim, and sim.metrics.transmissions > 0. Evidence: matching *-uart.log, *-renode.log, *-stdio.log, .resc, ELF, and harness.py under /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/. T1000-E physical backend BLOCKED: no matching USB device attached; only /dev/tty.usbserial-A704ESXG observed, and flashing requires explicit authorization. Linked follow-up project-LICHEN-sr55 remains open. Harness terminated Renode process groups and stopped simulator servers; AWS fleet attempts were separately reconciled and cleaned. Validation: 13 focused RenodeServer tests pass, Ruff passes, bash -n passes, py_compile passes, git diff --check passes, and three independent final review areas converged with no findings.
ERRATUM from independent audit: the recorded Nucleo lora_ping environment path ending nucleo_wl55jc_renode.repl was a transcription error and does not exist. The successful retained generated script used LICHEN_PLATFORM=lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/support/stm32wl55.repl, visible in lichen-m5m1-lora-ping-nucleo-wl55jc.resc. The retained UART and Renode logs support the WIN; use the corrected platform path for reproduction.
EVIDENCE RERUN 2026-07-16: all three Renode WINs rerun sequentially with retained independent oracle stdout. T-Echo ELF SHA-256 4ddbea69b20a609b60400dbaf08b9e78dd442806cf42c5fcd51b1874d70e25fd, transmissions=1. RAK4631 ELF SHA-256 234025c40f6de2461cecc6102d818c824c114fc03f1b6ce5167a02c19ee119e2, transmissions=1. Nucleo WL55JC ELF SHA-256 d05bd24ea3bf7f92140d50b9a78f1d86cf21e00422892d1f3115ae1214bf82c6, transmissions=1. Every oracle required boot, LoRa configuration, TX done, lichen-sim connection, and simulator metrics transmissions > 0. Evidence directory /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-nine-runs-20260716T1800Z; SHA256SUMS manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4; credential scan passed.
close_reason: Proved lora_ping boots and externally transmits on T-Echo, RAK4631, and Nucleo WL55JC Renode backends with retained artifact hashes/logs; classified T1000-E hardware BLOCKED under project-LICHEN-sr55; cleanup and three-pass review completed.
